overview.description: B2B Sales & Product AI platform that activates product knowledge via digital twin and AI agents
overview.description_long: OmniCrane builds a product-centric AI platform that transforms enterprise data and product knowledge into an AI-queryable digital twin. The platform provides B2B sales and product professionals with a suite of AI use cases: an AI Product Expert (QnA over product data), AI content assistants for personalised collateral, micro-segmentation of leads, micro-campaigns, and a Recommender engine. Designed for SMBs and enterprises in telecoms, finance, and utilities.
overview.tagline: Your Product Knowledge. Activated by AI.

history.origin_story: Founded in January 2021 by Richard A. Novák, Ph.D., a data and digitalisation expert with 20+ years in sales, marketing and automation. Novák also founded the Data Ethics Lab at Prague University of Economics.

key_milestones.event: Selected for CzechInvest Innovative Efforts competition and awarded 1 mio CZK prize

notable_people.name: Richard A. Novák
notable_people.role: Founder of Prague Data Ethics Lab (Prague University of Economics)

partnerships: Data Ethics Lab, Prague University of Economics

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: OmniCrane is an AI sales/product layer that converts company data into a queryable digital twin and generates content — capabilities that are rapidly being commoditised by Salesforce Einstein, HubSpot AI, Microsoft Copilot for Sales, and native LLM tools. There is no evidence of proprietary models or deep data moats that would resist displacement.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: B2B sales AI is a real and growing market, but it is extremely crowded with well-funded incumbents (Salesforce, HubSpot, Microsoft) building comparable capabilities. OmniCrane targets SMBs in Central Europe, which provides a niche but limited total addressable market.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Only known external support is a 1M CZK (~$43K) grant from CzechInvest in 2021. No subsequent funding rounds or revenue signals found. LinkedIn shows only 78 company followers and the team appears to be fewer than 10 people, suggesting limited runway.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Combination of high AGI displacement risk (thin AI wrapper on standard LLM/recommendation capabilities), strong incumbent competition, and no known institutional funding puts OmniCrane in a high overall risk category for job-seekers evaluating company stability.

metadata.notes: Company registered as Omnicrane, s.r.o. (IČ: 09862251), incorporated 2021-01-27. HQ is technically Ohrobec (Praha-západ district), not Prague city proper, but operates in the Prague metro area. LinkedIn followers count of 78 suggests micro-startup with very small team. The 1M CZK CzechInvest grant amount converted at ~$0.043/CZK.
